change_reason: Record deterministic project-fit attachment requirement from DELIB-S347
explicit_change_request: AUQ DELIB-S347-PROJECT-SCOPED-IMPLEMENTATION-AUTHORIZATION: Owner approved attaching generated work to an existing project when it fits, without auto-creating projects or using fuzzy matching.
full_content:
## Specification

When GT-KB auto-creates or links a work item for a newly confirmed implementation-bearing specification, the work item may attach to an existing active project only through deterministic project-fit evidence. If no single active project is deterministically identified, the work item remains unassigned in implementation intake.

## Required Behavior

- Deterministic project-fit evidence includes an explicit project id or project_ids value in spec constraints, or an active project artifact link whose artifact type is `spec` and artifact ref is the spec id.
- Exactly one active matching project attaches the work item to that project.
- Zero matching projects leaves the work item unassigned with a no-fit reason.
- More than one matching project leaves the work item unassigned with an ambiguous-fit reason.
- Semantic, fuzzy, or LLM project matching is out of scope for automatic attachment.

## Evidence

Owner decision: `DELIB-S347-PROJECT-SCOPED-IMPLEMENTATION-AUTHORIZATION`.
Bridge approval: `bridge/gtkb-project-scoped-implementation-authorization-004.md`.
